description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, a recessed entryway, and a combination of large and small rectangular windows. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with a green lawn area in the front yard and a paved driveway. The house has a prominent balcony or terrace on the upper level, and the rear and side elevations are mostly solid with minimal window openings. The overall structure is boxy and streamlined, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The main entry is sheltered and visually defined by the overhanging upper floor and supporting columns.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, covered porch, and a green front lawn. The design features clean lines, large windows, and a prominent upper-level balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, green lawn, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended balcony, flat roof, and the length of the green lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings, a staircase visible, and a solid wall dominating the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid exterior wall and a portion of the green lawn at the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered porch, supported by columns and an overhanging upper floor, minimal decorative elements.
